task: Turn the local v1 reference stack into a product-mode desktop shell where the backend can serve the production PWA directly and the startup script no longer requires users to understand separate frontend and backend ports.
constraints: Do not implement relay in this task.
Do not delete or archive untracked backlog files.
Do not change the WebSocket protocol.
Keep the existing Vite development server path available for developer use.
done_when: Product startup builds the PWA and serves it from the backend under a stable mobile path.
Pairing links point to the backend-served PWA when product mode is enabled.
Developer startup mode can still run the Vite dev server.
Automated tests cover product-mode URL construction and static PWA mounting behavior.
